message: wizard: reduce auth fatigue on status-check

files.patch:
@@ -196,6 +196,23 @@ export default function StatusCheckPage() { + +
+

+ Most people start with one coding agent and add + the rest later. +

+
    +
  • Recommended now: Claude Code
    • +
  • Optional now: Codex, Gemini (only if you plan to use them)
    • +
  • Later: Cloud tools (Wrangler / Supabase / Vercel), GitHub CLI, etc.
    • +
+

+ If you skip a login, the tool is still installed — it just won't work until you authenticate. +

+
+ + {/* Auth commands grouped by category */} {(["access", "agent", "cloud"] as const).map((category) => { const services = authServices[category];
